requiredSourceArtifacts.role: Terminal 4 primary geometry and/or placement source
airport layout, parking, heading, taxi and placement authority
Terminal 4 support geometry and object placements
Terminal 4 materials, light maps and support textures

extractionRules: extract only assets required for the B15-to-A1 corridor
preserve source-derived scale, orientation and placement provenance
record every manual correction separately from source-derived values
convert only cleaned corridor assets to browser-ready GLB or glTF
partition geometry into loadable sectors and levels of detail
do not copy raw BGL, BMP or DDS files into the production runtime
releaseGates: ADEX-derived gate identifiers and placements are recorded before scenario selection is enabled
debug markers expose every gate point, heading, path and clearance envelope
converted assets validate and stay within documented browser budgets
the live simulator loads only the selected Terminal 4 sector
GitHub Pages remains the sole production host
